sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: reallocate portfolio quarterly based on recalculated optimal f from previous quarter results, adjusting for account growth/withdrawals. New allocation = Previous allocation × (Current Account Value / Previous Account Value) − periodic withdrawals. Designed to maximize geometric growth through dynamic rebalancing.

source_rule_text: Reallocate positions based on optimal f amount at periodic intervals (quarterly), recalculating allocations based on account growth and withdrawals to maximize geometric growth.
